releases_2025_2026.description: Major release with VSPC API v2, IBD catchup improvements, performance optimizations

kips_kip0017.note: File not found - KIP-0017 is in pull request stage at https://github.com/kaspanet/kips/pull/32

essence.covenants_plus_plus: Advanced UTXO-based covenants with covenant IDs and opcodes
essence.active_features: Some features on mainnet, others on testnet
key_kips: KIP-10: New Transaction Opcodes for Enhanced Script Functionality
KIP-17: Covenants and Improved Scripting Capabilities

covenant_concepts.covenant_id: 32 byte hash stored on UTXO representing covenant lineage
covenant_concepts.covenant_binding: Transaction output field with authorizing_input and covenant_id
covenant_concepts.genesis_creation: Creating new covenant ID via BLAKE2b hash
covenant_concepts.continuation: Output inherits covenant ID from authorizing input

opcodes.name: OpTxVersion
opcodes.description: Returns the version of the transaction

opcodes.name: OpTxLockTime
opcodes.description: Returns the locktime field of the transaction

opcodes.name: OpTxSubnetId
opcodes.description: Returns the subnetwork ID of the transaction

opcodes.name: OpTxGas
opcodes.description: Returns the gas field of the transaction

opcodes.name: OpTxPayloadLen
opcodes.description: Returns the payload length of the transaction

opcodes.name: OpTxPayloadSubstr
opcodes.description: Returns the payload substring of the transaction from start to end

opcodes.name: OpTxInputSpkLen
opcodes.description: Returns the script public key length of the specified input

opcodes.name: OpTxInputSpkSubstr
opcodes.description: Returns the script public key substring of the specified input

opcodes.name: OpTxOutputSpkLen
opcodes.description: Returns the script public key length of the specified output

opcodes.name: OpTxOutputSpkSubstr
opcodes.description: Returns the script public key substring of the specified output

opcodes.name: OpTxInputScriptSigLen
opcodes.description: Returns the script signature length of the input

opcodes.name: OpTxInputScriptSigSubstr
opcodes.description: Returns the script signature substring of the input

opcodes.name: OpOutpointTxId
opcodes.description: Returns the transaction ID of the outpoint

opcodes.name: OpOutpointIndex
opcodes.description: Returns the index of the outpoint

opcodes.name: OpTxInputSeq
opcodes.description: Returns the sequence number of the input

opcodes.name: OpTxInputIsCoinbase
opcodes.description: Returns whether the input is a coinbase

opcodes.name: OpCat
opcodes.description: Concatenates two byte strings

opcodes.name: OpSubstr
opcodes.description: Returns the substring of a byte string

opcodes.name: OpBlake2bWithKey
opcodes.description: Returns the Blake2b hash of the data with key for domain separation

opcodes.name: OpInvert
opcodes.description: Returns the bitwise NOT of a byte string

opcodes.name: OpAnd
opcodes.description: Returns the bitwise AND of two byte strings

opcodes.name: OpOr
opcodes.description: Returns the bitwise OR of two byte strings

opcodes.name: OpXor
opcodes.description: Returns the bitwise XOR of two byte strings

opcodes.name: OpMul
opcodes.description: Returns the product of two numbers

opcodes.name: OpDiv
opcodes.description: Returns the quotient of two numbers

opcodes.name: OpMod
opcodes.description: Returns the remainder of two numbers

structs.EpisodeError: Authentication, validation, and rollback errors for contract logic

summary.rusty_kaspa_status: Active development with recent major v1.1.0 release featuring VSPC API v2
summary.covenants_status: In active development (KIP-17/20), some features on testnet awaiting mainnet deployment
summary.kdapp_episodes: Episode-based self-replicating Kaspa dApp engine for creating autonomous applications on Kaspa
summary.silverscript: CashScript-inspired language for covenant script development
